notes: D51 (Apr 19): GHALIBAF CLAIMS 'PROGRESS' вҖ” HORMUZ STILL CLOSED, 2 DAYS TO EXPIRY. (1) GHALIBAF 'PROGRESS': Iran parliament speaker and chief negotiator said there is 'progress' in US-Iran talks вҖ” most positive statement from Tehran since Islamabad collapse Apr 13. (2) HORMUZ CLOSED: 0 vessels transited; Iran maintaining closure after Saturday's IRGC gunfire on Indian ships; Trump refused to lift blockade. (3) ROUND 2 MONDAY: Islamabad talks expected Apr 21 = same day as ceasefire expiry; both sides have not simultaneously confirmed. (4) TRUMP THREAT: No extension if no deal by Apr 21 expiry. Three sticking points: nuclear enrichment, US blockade/Hormuz, war-damage compensation. (5) OIL: Brent $97.8, WTI $93.2 вҖ” holding near highs on Hormuz supply uncertainty. (6) POLYMARKET: ceasefire extended by Apr 21 = 74%; regime falls by Apr 30 = 2%; regime falls 2026 = 20%; conflict ends Dec-31 = 98%. (7) PAKISTAN army chief Munir + Egypt + Turkey pushing for Round 2. Lebanon ceasefire Day 3 holding. 15 straight days zero Iran-US-Israel attacks. Internet Day 6 business partial ($1.8B+). 2 days to Apr 21.

D50 (Apr 18): IRAN FIRES ON INDIAN SHIPS IN HORMUZ вҖ” STRAIT RE-CLOSED. (1) HORMUZ RE-CLOSED + SHOTS FIRED: Iranian Navy gunboats fired on two Indian-flagged vessels (VLCC Sanmar Herald + 1 other) after US refused to lift blockade. First kinetic force on civilian shipping since ceasefire began. India summoned Iranian ambassador. (2) OIL REBOUNDED: Brent $96.10 (+6.3%), WTI $91.80 (+9.5%) вҖ” partial recovery from D49 crash. (3) 23 VESSELS INTERCEPTED by US blockade total. (4) ROUND 2 MONDAY: Iranian sources say next Islamabad talks Apr 21 = same day as ceasefire expiry. (5) POLYMARKET: ceasefire-extended-by-Apr-21 = 74%; conflict-ends-Dec-31 = 97%. (6) TRUMP: 'pretty good news' about Iran (unspecified). Iran studying fresh US proposals. D49 (Apr 17): IRAN OPENS HORMUZ вҖ” OIL CRASHES 11%. Iran FM Araghchi: Hormuz 'completely open' during Lebanon ceasefire. Trump: US blockade stays. Brent $90.38 (-9%), WTI $83.85 (-11.4%) вҖ” second largest drop since war. 8 vessels transited. CNN: Round 2 Pakistan Monday per Iranian sources. Lebanon ceasefire Day 2 holding. 14 straight days zero Iran-US-Israel attacks through D50.

D48 EVE UPDATE (Apr 16 16:00 ET): ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE 5PM ET + BLOCKADE WIDENED WORLDWIDE + POLYMARKET 78% EXTENSION. (1) TRUMP ANNOUNCED 10-DAY ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE effective 5PM ET вҖ” Hezbollah accepts if Israeli strikes stop; Israel retains self-defense; extendable by mutual consent. Iran Speaker Ghalibaf: 'as important as' Iran ceasefire. (2) BLOCKADE WIDENED WORLDWIDE вҖ” Gen. Dan Caine (Joint Chiefs): US forces will stop any Iran-linked vessel ANYWHERE globally (weapons, oil, metals, electronics), including Pacific operations. 14 ships turned away cumulative; zero boardings. (3) WHITE HOUSE: Leavitt 'productive and ongoing'; Trump talks 'probably, maybe over the weekend'; Hegseth 'ready to restart combat' if no deal. (4) IRAN: armed forces threatened Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea blockade in retaliation; rial -8% since war (-60% since 2025); inflation 47%, food 105%; internet $1.8B cost. (5) POLYMARKET DRAMATIC SHIFT: ceasefire-extended-by-Apr-21 = 78%, holds-Apr-30 = 68%, holds-May-31 = 79%, holds-Dec-31 = 98%, conflict-ends-Dec-31 = 97%, Trump-announces-end-by-Jun-30 = 85%. Brent $94.89 (-0.04%), WTI intraday volatility $90.72-$94.62 on US crude inventory draw. Hormuz ~6 vessels. 10-day Iran zero-attack streak. Lebanon dead 2,100+. Ceasefire Day 10. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry. ALSO: backfilled Apr 15 + Apr 16 entries into ceasefireViolations / Negotiations / EconomicRecovery (morning commit only updated standard per-day arrays).

D48 (Apr 16 07:00 ET): BLOCKADE DAY 3 вҖ” MUNIR IN TEHRAN + 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION + NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH HOPES. (1) PAKISTAN ARMY CHIEF MUNIR IN TEHRAN: Asim Munir arrived in Tehran with fresh US proposal to advance Round 2 talks. First Pakistani Army Chief visit to Iran since war began. Bringing US message on nuclear compromise. (2) 'IN PRINCIPLE' CEASEFIRE EXTENSION (AP): Regional officials told AP that US and Iran have an 'in principle agreement' to extend the ceasefire beyond Apr 21 to allow more diplomacy. Senior US official to CNBC: 'has not formally agreed' вҖ” extension not formal yet. (3) TRUMP 'AMAZING TWO DAYS AHEAD' + 'BEATEN THEM MILITARILY': Trump Times of Israel: 'I think you're going to be watching an amazing two days ahead.' Fox Business: 'We've beaten them militarily, totally.' Said not thinking about extending ceasefire вҖ” implies deal, not extension, is the goal. (4) NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH HOPES: Pakistani mediators optimistic about 'major breakthrough' on nuclear front per Al Jazeera/ANI. Key gap now clearer: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze. Iran's ~440kg HEU stockpile on table. (5) WHITE HOUSE 'FEELS GOOD': Press secretary: 'We feel good about the prospects of a deal.' Discussions 'productive and ongoing.' Iran spokesperson: 'several messages exchanged through Pakistan.' (6) IRAN PETROCHEMICALS SUSPENDED: Iran National Petrochemical Company halted all exports 'until further notice' (Apr 13 order) вҖ” $13B/yr industry, ~$54M/day, to prioritize domestic supply after South Pars strikes. (7) BLOCKADE DAY 3 NO CONFRONTATION: 10+ ships turned back since Monday. Iran threatened to block Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea if blockade continues вҖ” counter-threat but no action. Brent $94.89 (-0.87%). WTI ~$90.72. Zero attacks D40-D48 (10 straight). Ceasefire Day 10 вҖ” 5 days to Apr 21. Convergence 5.7 (вҶ‘ from 5.0).

D47 UPDATED (Apr 15 12:30 ET): BLOCKADE DAY 2 вҖ” TRUMP 'CLOSE TO OVER' + IRAN $270B DEMAND + INTERNET PARTIAL. (1) TRUMP 'CLOSE TO OVER': Told Fox Business 'I think it's close to over, yeah. Very close to over.' вҖ” strongest presidential statement yet, upgrades NY Post '2 days' signal. (2) IRAN $270B WAR COMPENSATION DEMAND: Spokeswoman Mohajerani: Iran suffered ~$270B in direct+indirect damages since Feb 28. Demand will be raised in all future talks. Iran's 5-point counter: end attacks, security guarantees, $270B reparations, sovereignty over Hormuz, international recognition. (3) INTERNET PARTIAL RESTORATION: Iran started offering 'pro internet' package for BUSINESSES (April 14 вҖ” Bloomberg, ASL19). Citizens still cut off вҖ” but first crack in 47-day blackout. $30-40M/day direct cost to Iranian economy driving partial reversal. (4) ISRAEL-LEBANON TALKS OUTCOME: Lebanon amb Hamadeh: 'constructive.' Israel amb Leiter: 'wonderful exchange.' Both sides agreed next round in 'a few weeks' in Washington. Key ask: remove Hezbollah + ceasefire. Hezbollah still opposing. Rubio: 'working against decades of history.' (5) BLOCKADE 'FULLY IMPLEMENTED' (CENTCOM): All seaborne trade to/from Iran halted. Brent $95.72 (+2.13% from Apr 14 open, down from $96.48 close). WTI $91.50 (-8% day). Zero attacks D47. Ceasefire Day 9 вҖ” 6 days to Apr 21.

D46 (Apr 14 22:00 ET): BLOCKADE DAY 1 ENDS вҖ” DIPLOMACY STIRS. US Navy blockade active since 10AM ET. BBC Verify: at least 4 Iran-related ships crossed Hormuz. China-linked tanker tested blockade. Trump: 'ceasefire holding well' but 'I don't care' about new talks. Brent fell further to ~$96.48 (-3% from Sunday). Turkey FM Fidan: ceasefire could be EXTENDED 45-60 DAYS. Israel-Lebanon direct talks at State Dept 11AM ET вҖ” FIRST since 1993 (Rubio + ambassadors Leiter + Hamadeh). Hezbollah's Qassem urged Lebanon to cancel. Egypt FM to DC for Rubio meeting. Pakistan PM: ceasefire 'holding.' Regional source (CNN): another negotiation round possible. US destroyed 4 Houthi drones in Yemen. 20,000 vessels stranded. Zero attacks D46. Ceasefire Day 8. 7 days to Apr 21. Internet ~1,104+ hrs.

D45 (Apr 13 14:00 ET): TRUMP DECLARES NAVAL BLOCKADE вҖ” US Navy to blockade all Iranian port traffic in Hormuz starting 10AM ET Monday (Apr 14). CENTCOM confirmed. Iran calls it 'piracy.' Brent surged ~$102 (+8%). UK/France/Spain/Turkey refuse to join blockade. China condemns. Ceasefire Day 7 of 14. Zero Iranian attacks D40-D45. But blockade = ceasefire effectively dead at sea. Lebanon 2,055+ killed. HRANA still 3,636. Internet 1,080+ hrs (45 days). Polymarket ceasefire-holds crashing. 8 days to Apr 21 expiry.

D44 MIDDAY (Apr 12 12:00 ET): TALKS FAILED вҖ” 21-HOUR ISLAMABAD MARATHON ENDS WITH NO DEAL. Vance left Pakistan: 'Iran chose not to accept our terms.' Key gaps: nuclear weapons commitment, Hormuz control, enriched uranium, sanctions. Ghalibaf blames US for 'trust' failure. Trump hints NAVAL BLOCKADE (shares article). US destroyers USS Peterson + USS Murphy attempted Hormuz mine-clearing D43 вҖ” IRGC threatened, launched UAV, disputed if transit succeeded. Brent $95.20. Ceasefire technically holds through Apr 21 but talks collapse = escalation risk surging. Lebanon: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded. HRANA still 3,636. Internet 1,056+ hrs.

D44 EVENING (Apr 12 22:00 ET): TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left Islamabad with no deal. Ghalibaf blamed US. Polymarket ceasefire markets in dispute. Oil rising on collapse вҖ” Brent ~$98.50. Hormuz effectively re-closed by Iran вҖ” $1M+ tolls, ~5 vessels/day. Internet 1056+ hrs. Lebanon strikes continued (Israel rejected ceasefire with Hezbollah). US warships attempted Hormuz transit Apr 11, Iran issued 'last warning.' Ceasefire technically holding in Gulf but diplomatically dead.

D41 MIDDAY (Apr 09 12:00 ET): CEASEFIRE FRAGILE вҖ” LEBANON FRACTURE POINT. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation over Israel's 100+ site Lebanon strikes (254+ killed Apr 9 per AJ). IRGC threatens to re-block Hormuz. Parliament speaker warns 'STRONG responses.' Iran considering pulling out of deal. BUT zero Iranian attacks D41 вҖ” ceasefire holding on Iran side. Oil rebounding: Brent ~$97.39 (up from $95.80). WTI ~$93.50. Hormuz still mostly blocked: 'negligible' traffic per Bloomberg, 800+ ships stranded, ~5-10/day vs 135 normal. Talks MOVED to Saturday Apr 12 Islamabad вҖ” VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner delegation. Houthis attacked Maersk Yorktown (US-flagged) + Hope Island + MSC Grace F + MSC Gina + 2 US frigates. HRANA: 3,636 deaths. Hengaw: 6,620 military. Lebanon: 1,784+ killed, 5,977 wounded. Internet 984+ hrs.

D40 MORNING (Apr 08 09:05 ET): CEASEFIRE HOLDING. 2-week US-Iran truce in effect from overnight. Iran reopening Strait of Hormuz under armed-forces coordination; first tankers transiting. Brent -$13 to ~$95.80 (war premium unwinding). Islamabad talks Friday Apr 10 вҖ” VP Vance leading US, Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir mediating. Residual Gulf attacks (UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait) in early hours before stand-down. Israel still active in Lebanon (explicitly excluded from ceasefire). Trump: 'no enrichment' вҖ” will 'dig out nuclear dust.'
Source hierarchy: CNN/NBC/NPR/CBS/Axios/Bloomberg/Al Jazeera/Times of Israel/Reuters live blogs Apr 07-08 2026. Brent via oilpriceapi/Fortune Apr 08.

metrics_fa.desc: ШұЩҲШІ Ыі ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЩҲЫҢЫҢ. ЫұЫ°+ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘЩҮ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ: Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ Ш®Щ„ЫҢШ¬/Ш№Щ…Ш§ЩҶ/ШіШұШ® Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ Ш§ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЫҢШ§ШЁШҜ. ЩҫШӘШұЩҲШҙЫҢЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ.

metrics_fa.label: ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі
metrics_fa.desc: Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ (AP). ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ.' Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ: ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…вҖҢЩҮШ§ ШұШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШҜЩ„ ШҙШҜ. Ыө ШұЩҲШІ. ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЫіЫұЩӘ (вҶ“вҶ“). ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫіЫұЩӘ (вҶ‘вҶ‘ вҖ” Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ).

sitrep: D48 (Apr 16 07:00 ET): PAKISTAN ARMY CHIEF MUNIR ARRIVES IN TEHRAN вҖ” NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH PUSH. General Asim Munir, Pakistan's Army Chief, arrived in Tehran (Apr 15 evening local) carrying a fresh US proposal for Round 2 talks. Pakistani mediators tell Al Jazeera they are 'optimistic about a major breakthrough' on Iran's nuclear programme. Key nuclear gap now defined: 5-yr vs 20-yr uranium enrichment freeze. Iran's ~440kg highly enriched uranium stockpile on the table.

'IN PRINCIPLE' CEASEFIRE EXTENSION вҖ” NOT FORMAL YET. TRUMP: 'AMAZING TWO DAYS AHEAD.' AP (regional officials): US and Iran have 'in principle agreement' to extend ceasefire beyond Apr 21. BUT senior US official to CNBC: 'US has not formally agreed to extension.' Trump told Times of Israel he's 'not thinking about extending ceasefire' and predicts 'an amazing two days ahead' вҖ” deal, not extension, appears to be the goal. White House: 'We feel good about the prospects of a deal.' Iran: 'Several messages exchanged through Pakistan.'

IRAN PETROCHEMICALS SUSPENDED + COUNTER-THREAT ON GULF SHIPPING. Iran National Petrochemical Company halted all exports 'until further notice' (Apr 13 order) to prioritize domestic supply after South Pars strikes вҖ” $13B/yr, ~$54M/day offline. Iran also threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman AND Red Sea shipping if US blockade continues. Blockade Day 3: 10+ ships turned back, no confrontation вҖ” Iran calculating, not acting on threat.

TRUMP: 'WE'VE BEATEN THEM MILITARILY, TOTALLY.' BRENT $94.89 (вҶ“), WTI $90.72 (вҶ“). Fox Business. Oil fell further on deal signals вҖ” Brent down from D47 $95.72. Market pricing ~40% deal probability before Apr 21. Business internet partial continuing вҖ” Day 3. Zero attacks D40-D48 (10 straight days). Ceasefire Day 10 вҖ” 5 days to Apr 21.

CONVERGENCE 5.7 вҖ” FOURTH CONSECUTIVE IMPROVEMENT. DEAL AND COLLAPSE TIED AT 31%. D45: 4.2 вҶ’ D46: 4.6 вҶ’ D47: 5.0 вҶ’ D48: 5.7. Biggest single-day jump in convergence. Deal 31% = highest probability since original ceasefire Apr 7. Collapse 31% = lowest since ceasefire began. Both scenarios now tied вҖ” coin flip moment.

RISKS: 5-YR vs 20-YR NUCLEAR GAP NOT BRIDGED. COUNTER-THREAT. 5 DAYS TO EXPIRY. Even with Munir in Tehran, the nuclear gap is structural: Iran likely accepting 5-yr freeze; US wants 20-yr. 440kg HEU disposal method unresolved. Iran's counter-blockade threat (Gulf/Red Sea/Oman) = escalation card still in hand. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.
sitrep_fa: ШұЩҲШІ ЫҙЫё (ЫұЫ¶ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„): Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ вҖ” ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ. ЪҳЩҶШұШ§Щ„ Ш№Ш§ШөЩ… Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұШҢ ШұШҰЫҢШі Ш§ШұШӘШҙ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶШҢ ШЁШ§ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ ШҙШҜ. Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶЫҢ: 'Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ШЁШІШұЪҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ.' ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ Ъ©Щ„ЫҢШҜЫҢ: Ыө ШіШ§Щ„ vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ ШәЩҶЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ. ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU ШұЩҲЫҢ Щ…ЫҢШІ.

ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ вҖ” ЩҮЩҶЩҲШІ ШұШіЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ.' AP (Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮЩҮ): ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ. Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ… Ш§ШұШҙШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ CNBC: ШұШіЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: 'ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҒЪ©Шұ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩ…' + 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ' = ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩҶЩҮ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ. Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ: 'Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢЩ….' Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ: 'ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…вҖҢЩҮШ§ ШұШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШҜЩ„ ШҙШҜ.'

ЩҫШӘШұЩҲШҙЫҢЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ + ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ. ШҙШұЪ©ШӘ Щ…Щ„ЫҢ ЩҫШӘШұЩҲШҙЫҢЩ…ЫҢ: ШөШ§ШҜШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ ШӘШ§ Ш§Ш·Щ„Ш§Ш№ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЫҢ. $ЫұЫіB/ШіШ§Щ„ШҢ $ЫөЫҙM/ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ: Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ Ш®Щ„ЫҢШ¬ + ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ…Ш§ЩҶ + ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢ ШіШұШ® Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ Ш§ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЫҢШ§ШЁШҜ. Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШұЩҲШІ Ыі: ЫұЫ°+ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘЩҮШҢ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЩҲЫҢЫҢ.

ЩҶЩҒШӘ: ШЁШұЩҶШӘ $Ы№Ыҙ.ЫёЫ№ (вҶ“)ШҢ WTI $Ы№Ы°.Ы·ЫІ (вҶ“). ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: 'Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ….' Fox Business. Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ D47 $Ы№Ыө.Ы·ЫІ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ Ъ©ШіШЁвҖҢЩҲЪ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШұЩҲШІ Ыі. ШөЩҒШұ ШӯЩ…Щ„ЩҮ D40-D48 (ЫұЫ° ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШӘЩҲШ§Щ„ЫҢ). ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ ЫұЫ° вҖ” Ыө ШұЩҲШІ.

ЩҮЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ыө.Ы· вҖ” ЪҶЩҮШ§ШұЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШӘЩҲШ§Щ„ЫҢ ШЁЩҮШЁЩҲШҜ. ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЫіЫұЩӘ = ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫіЫұЩӘ вҖ” Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ. D45: Ыҙ.ЫІ вҶ’ D46: Ыҙ.Ы¶ вҶ’ D47: Ыө.Ы° вҶ’ D48: Ыө.Ы·. ШЁШІШұЪҜвҖҢШӘШұЫҢЩҶ Ш¬ЩҮШҙ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫіЫұЩӘ = ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШІ ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі.

ШұЫҢШіЪ©вҖҢЩҮШ§: ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ. Ыө ШұЩҲШІ. ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘШ§ШұЫҢ: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӢ Ыө ШіШ§Щ„ ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜШҢ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ. ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU ШӯЩ„вҖҢЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ. Ыө ШұЩҲШІ ШӘШ§ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D38: fragment est. D39: ceasefire. D40-D48: 0+0 ceasefire holding. D48: Blockade Day 3, 0 attacks. Munir in Tehran. 'In principle' extension. Nuclear breakthrough hopes.
dailySeries.confidenceNote: 1.0 = JPost verified day-by-day (D1-D10). 0.8 = UAE MoD official scaled (D11). 0.6 = fragment estimates from Gulf reports (D12-D29). 0.5 = latest data, less verified (D30+).

oil.note: D48 (Apr 16): Brent $94.89 (вҶ“ from D47 $95.72). WTI $90.72 (вҶ“ from $91.50). CONTINUED DECLINE on deal signals вҖ” Munir in Tehran, 'in principle' extension (AP), Trump 'amazing two days.' Iran petrochemicals suspended ($54M/day offline). Market pricing ~40% deal before Apr 21. If deal: $85-90. If collapse: $115-125+.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Apr 09 (D41). Ceasefire Day 3. Zero Iranian missiles/drones. Houthi attacks: Maersk Yorktown, Hope Island, MSC Grace F, MSC Gina, 2 US frigates. Israel 100+ sites in Lebanon (254+ killed).

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever вҖ” suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately вҖ” 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones вҖ” highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA вҖ” first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate down 69% missiles, 74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate down 79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 вҖ” first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate down 85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate down 90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 вҖ” 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate down 92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) вҖ” post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume вҖ” cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq вҖ” 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil вҖ” first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only вҖ” no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic down 86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones вҖ” LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP вҖ” Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic down 90%, drones down 95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil вҖ” but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel вҖ” capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED вҖ” Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than down 90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports down 61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing вҖ” Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing вҖ” using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.

D40 CEASEFIRE HOLDING (Apr 08): 2-week US-Iran ceasefire took effect overnight. Residual Gulf-state attacks reported by UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait in early hours before full stand-down. Iran SNSC confirmed safe passage through Hormuz; first commercial tankers transited under Iranian armed forces coordination. Brent crashed -$13 to ~$95.80 as war premium unwinds. Trump: 'no enrichment' non-negotiable вҖ” will 'dig out nuclear dust.' Israel continues Lebanon operations (ceasefire explicitly excludes Lebanon). Islamabad talks set for Friday Apr 10; VP Vance leading US delegation; Pakistan PM Sharif + Field Marshal Munir mediating. Iranian street celebrations in Tehran/Baghdad; skeptics warn of 'regrouping' window. HRANA 3,560+.

D41 CEASEFIRE FRAGILE вҖ” LEBANON FRACTURE (Apr 09): Zero Iranian attacks вҖ” ceasefire holding on Iran side. BUT Israel hit 100+ sites in Lebanon in 10 minutes вҖ” largest coordinated strike since war began. 254+ killed Apr 9 per AJ. Total Lebanon 1,784+ killed, 5,977 wounded. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation. IRGC threatens to re-block Hormuz. Parliament speaker warns 'STRONG responses.' Iran considering pulling out. Brent rebounding ~$97.39 (from $95.80). Hormuz still mostly blocked: 'negligible' per Bloomberg, 800+ ships stranded, ~5-10/day. Talks moved to Saturday Apr 12 вҖ” VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner. Houthis attacked Maersk Yorktown (US-flagged) + 5 other targets. HRANA: 3,636. Internet 984+ hrs. Lebanon dispute = #1 collapse risk: Pakistan/Iran say Lebanon IN ceasefire; US/Israel say NOT.

D42 CEASEFIRE HOLDING (Apr 10): Iran delegation arrives in Pakistan for talks. Trump warns of renewed/intensified strikes if deal not reached. Israel continues Lebanon strikes вҖ” Hezbollah exchanges ongoing. 300+ killed in Wednesday's strikes. Hormuz still mostly blocked вҖ” no mine clearing. Brent ~$96 (stable). Internet ~1,008+ hrs (42 days). Zero Iranian attacks.

D43 MARATHON TALKS BEGIN + HORMUZ MINE-CLEARING (Apr 11): 21-hour marathon talks BEGIN in Islamabad вҖ” Vance + Witkoff + Kushner + Iran delegation. US Navy destroyers USS Frank E. Peterson Jr. + USS Michael Murphy attempt Hormuz transit for mine-clearing. IRGC threatens ships, launches UAV at vessels. Disputed whether transit succeeded or ships turned back. Trump: US has begun 'clearing' Hormuz. IRGC: 'deal severely with unauthorized ships.' Brent ~$96 (stable). Lebanon: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded.

D44 TALKS FAILED (Apr 12): 21-hour Islamabad marathon ended with NO DEAL. Vance left Pakistan: 'Iran chose not to accept our terms.' Key gaps: nuclear weapons commitment, Hormuz control, enriched uranium stockpile, sanctions lifting, war reparations. Iran FM Baghaei: 'gaps on major issues.' Ghalibaf blames US for 'trust' failure. HRANA: still 3,636 (no update since Apr 7). Internet ~1,056+ hrs (44 days).

D45 BLOCKADE DECLARED (Apr 13): Trump announced naval blockade of all Iranian ports via Hormuz starting 10AM ET Monday (Apr 14). CENTCOM confirmed. Iran: 'illegal piracy,' 'act of war during ceasefire.' IRGC threatens strong response. UK PM Starmer: Britain will NOT join. France, Spain, Turkey refuse. China condemns. Brent surged ~$102 (+8%). 3 tankers attempted exit after announcement (Bloomberg). Zero Iranian attacks D45. Ceasefire Day 7 of 14. Lebanon 2,055+ killed, 6,500+ wounded. HRANA: still 3,636. Internet ~1,080+ hrs (45 days). Polymarket ceasefire-holds crashing.

D46 BLOCKADE DAY 1 + DIPLOMACY (Apr 14): Blockade active since 10AM ET. BBC Verify: 4+ Iran ships crossed Hormuz. Trump: 'holding well' but 'I don't care' about new talks. Brent ~$96.48 (-3%). TURKEY FM FIDAN: ceasefire could be EXTENDED 45-60 DAYS. Israel-Lebanon DIRECT TALKS at State Dept вҖ” first since 1993 (Rubio + Leiter + Hamadeh). Hezbollah's Qassem: cancel talks. Egypt FM to DC. CNN: new round possible. US destroyed 4 Houthi drones. 20,000 vessels stranded. Zero attacks D46. Ceasefire Day 8. 7 days to Apr 21.

D47 TRUMP 'CLOSE TO OVER' + IRAN $270B + INTERNET PARTIAL (Apr 15): Trump Fox Business: 'I think it's close to over, yeah. Very close to over.' Iran spokeswoman Mohajerani: $270B war compensation demand in all future talks. Iran 5-pt counter: end attacks + security guarantees + $270B + Hormuz sovereignty + international recognition. Internet: Iran offering 'pro internet' for businesses (April 14, Bloomberg/ASL19). Israel-Lebanon talks 'constructive,' next round 'few weeks' in DC. CENTCOM: blockade 'fully implemented.' Blockade Day 2 no confrontation. Zero attacks D47. Ceasefire Day 9. 6 days to Apr 21.

Stockpile intact (rationing confirmed by political pause D40-D47). 9 straight days zero attacks. Business internet partial = Iran making economic concession. Turkey 45-60 day extension still active.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $95.72, WTI $91.50 (-8% day). OIL FELL on deal signals. Iran $270B demand = major gap but substantive engagement. Internet partial for businesses (new D46-D47). Israel-Lebanon 'constructive' = multi-track diplomacy working. CENTCOM blockade 'fully implemented' = maximum economic pressure on Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: D47 MIDDAY вҖ” TRUMP 'CLOSE TO OVER' UPGRADES DEAL CALCULUS. Three new developments post-07:00 ET: (1) Trump's 'close to over' quote is the most explicit presidential statement that war is ending вҖ” market-moving. (2) Iran's $270B demand clarifies negotiating position: huge ask but shows Iran is pricing a deal, not refusing one. (3) Business internet partial = Iran is making domestic economic concessions that ease operational pressure. Convergence 5.0 (from 4.8). Deal 24% (from 22%). Collapse 36% (from 37%).

dailyRows.primary: D48 MUNIR IN TEHRAN + 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION + NUCLEAR BREAKTHROUGH (Apr 16): Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arrived in Tehran with fresh US proposal for Round 2 talks. Pakistani mediators: 'optimistic about major breakthrough' on nuclear programme (Al Jazeera). AP (regional officials): US and Iran have 'in principle agreement' to extend ceasefire beyond Apr 21. Senior US official to CNBC: 'has not formally agreed.' Trump to Times of Israel: 'not thinking about extending' + 'amazing two days ahead.' Fox Business: 'We've beaten them militarily, totally.' White House: 'feels good about prospects of a deal.' Iran: 'several messages exchanged through Pakistan.' Iran petrochemicals suspended (National Petrochemical Company order Apr 13 вҖ” $13B/yr). Blockade Day 3 вҖ” 10+ ships turned back. Iran threatened to block Gulf/Sea of Oman/Red Sea if blockade continues. Business internet partial Day 3. Zero attacks D48. Ceasefire Day 10. 5 days to Apr 21.  ||  D48 EVE UPDATE (Apr 16 16:00 ET): TRUMP ANNOUNCED 10-DAY ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EFFECTIVE 5PM ET. Hezbollah said it would abide if Israeli attacks stop; Israel retains self-defense right; can be extended by mutual consent. Iran Speaker Ghalibaf: Lebanon ceasefire 'as important as' Iran's. Gen. Dan Caine (Joint Chiefs) WIDENED blockade scope WORLDWIDE вҖ” US forces will stop any vessel 'tied to Tehran or carrying supplies' (weapons, oil, metals, electronics) anywhere globally, including Pacific operations against ships that left before blockade began. 14 ships turned away cumulative (was 10+); zero boardings. Hegseth: US 'ready to restart combat' if no deal. Iran armed forces threatened to block Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea. POLYMARKET DRAMATIC SHIFT: ceasefire-extended-by-Apr-21 = 78% (vs 18% pre-blockade); holds-Apr-30 = 68%; holds-May-31 = 79%; conflict-ends-Dec-31 = 97%. Lebanon dead 2,100+. Internet 1,120+ hrs ($1.8B cost).

dailyRows.cost: Brent $94.89, WTI $90.72. Continued decline. Iran petrochemicals: $54M/day offline. Blockade: $435M/day eliminated. dailyRows.assessment: D48 вҖ” MUNIR IN TEHRAN + 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION = MOST SIGNIFICANT DIPLOMATIC DEVELOPMENT SINCE CEASEFIRE. Two signals in one day: (1) Pakistan's top military chief physically in Tehran = highest-level direct mediation since war began; (2) 'In principle' extension (AP) = both sides have implicitly agreed not to let ceasefire expire with no plan. Nuclear gap now has a number: 5-yr vs 20-yr. Iran's 440kg HEU = wild card. Trump 'amazing two days' = deal announcement, not extension, is the goal. Convergence 5.7 (from 5.0). Deal 31% = Collapse 31% for first time.  ||  EVE REASSESSMENT: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 5PM ET = THIRD positive on top of Munir-Tehran + 'in principle' extension. Removes the second-front pressure that was breaking original Iran ceasefire. Polymarket extension odds 78% confirms market pricing in deal. Counter-pressure: Caine worldwide blockade + Hegseth combat threat = calibrated stick paired with carrots. The bet: squeeze Iran to terms in next 5 days before Apr 21 expiry, OR formalize the AP-reported 'in principle' extension. Convergence ~6.5 (from 5.7). Deal probability now plausibly leading collapse for first time.

dailyRows.primary: D49 IRAN OPENS HORMUZ вҖ” OIL CRASHES 11% вҖ” TALKS MONDAY (Apr 17): Iran FM Araghchi declared Strait of Hormuz 'completely open' for commercial vessels during Lebanon ceasefire. Trump: US blockade remains in full force. Oil CRASHED: Brent -9% to $90.38, WTI -11.4% to $83.85 вҖ” second largest single-day drop since war began. 8 vessels transited Hormuz (up from 6). CNN: next round US-Iran talks in Pakistan Monday Apr 21, per Iranian sources. Pakistani officials in flurry of regional visits to secure Round 2. Trump: 'pretty good news' about Iran (did not reveal). Lebanon ceasefire Day 2 вҖ” holding. Lebanon dead 2,167+. Internet business partial Day 4 ($1.8B+ total). 13 straight days zero attacks. Ceasefire Day 11. 4 days to Apr 21.
dailyRows.capability: D49: 0+0. Ceasefire Day 11. dailyRows.assessment: D49 вҖ” HORMUZ 'OPEN' = TACTICAL SIGNAL, NOT STRUCTURAL SHIFT. Iran's Hormuz declaration is its biggest unilateral concession since the ceasefire, timed to Lebanon truce to build momentum for Monday talks. But Trump immediately said US blockade stays вҖ” both sides are signaling without coordinating. Oil crashed 11% = markets believe relief is coming. CNN confirms Iranian sources say Round 2 in Pakistan Monday Apr 21. Convergence 6.0 (вҶ‘ from ~6.5 D48 reassessment вҖ” oil crash reflects deal pricing). Deal leading scenario if Monday talks happen. 4 days to Apr 21.

dailyRows.primary: D50 IRAN FIRES ON INDIAN SHIPS вҖ” HORMUZ RE-CLOSED (Apr 18): Iran re-closed the Strait of Hormuz and Iranian Navy gunboats fired on two Indian-flagged vessels: VLCC Sanmar Herald (2M barrels Iraqi crude) + one other, after Trump refused to lift the US blockade. India summoned Iranian ambassador; New Delhi protested 'shooting incident.' Iran: Hormuz 'reverted to previous state.' Oil rebounded: Brent +6% to $96.10, WTI +9.5% to $91.80. 23 vessels intercepted by US blockade total. Polymarket: ceasefire extended by Apr 21 = 74%; conflict-ends-Dec-31 = 97%. Iranian sources: Round 2 talks in Islamabad Monday Apr 21 вҖ” same day as ceasefire expiry. Trump: 'pretty good news' (unspecified). Iran studying fresh US proposals. Internet business partial Day 5 ($1.8B+). Ceasefire (Iran-US-Israel) Day 12. 3 days to Apr 21.
dailyRows.capability: D50: 0+0 (Iran-US-Israel ceasefire technically holds). BUT Iran Navy fired live rounds at Indian civilian ships in Hormuz вҖ” first kinetic use of force against civilian shipping since ceasefire began. 14 straight days zero Iran-US-Israel attacks. Iran demonstrated ability to escalate below ceasefire threshold. Blockade counter-leverage strategy now active with real force.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $96.10 (+6.3% from D49 crash), WTI $91.80 (+9.5%). Partial rebound from D49 crash вҖ” Hormuz shots + re-closure reignited supply-fear premium. Internet $1.8B+ total.
dailyRows.assessment: D50 вҖ” SHOTS FIRED IN HORMUZ: CEASEFIRE HOLDS BUT ESCALATION LADDER CLIMBED. Iran firing on Indian ships is a critical signal: (1) NOT a ceasefire violation vs US/Israel; (2) IS kinetic force on civilian shipping; (3) India as target = Iran applying costs to third-party nations that benefit from US blockade. The 24-hour Hormuz cycle вҖ” open Friday, closed + shots fired Saturday вҖ” shows informal signals are too fragile. Monday talks in Pakistan (Apr 21 = same day as expiry) are now the fulcrum: deal, extension, or collapse. Polymarket extension 74% = market still bets on extension. Convergence ~5.5 (вҶ“ from 6.0 вҖ” shots fired spike uncertainty). Deal 28%, Collapse 33%, Extension 39%. 3 days to Apr 21.

But the Strait of Hormuz remained closed (0 vessels; shots-deterrence from Saturday's IRGC gunfire on Indian ships) and Trump threatened no ceasefire extension if no deal reached by Apr 21 expiry. Round 2 Islamabad talks still expected Monday Apr 21 = same day as expiry. Three sticking points remain unresolved: Iran nuclear enrichment rights, US naval blockade, war-damage compensation. Brent $97.8, WTI $93.2 (holding near highs on Hormuz supply-fear). Pakistan army chief Munir + Egypt + Turkey pushing for Round 2. Lebanon ceasefire Day 3 holding. Polymarket extension 74% = markets still price extension as most likely outcome. Convergence ~5.8 (вҶ‘ slight from 5.5 on Ghalibaf signal; structural gaps unchanged). 2 days to Apr 21.

timeline.body: Iran submitted 10-point maximalist counteroffer: permanent end, sanctions lifted, reconstruction, NPT enrichment, Hormuz toll. Trump: 'significant but not good enough.' REFUSES to extend. Iran military: 'helpless, stupid.' Markets surged. Brent $109.53. HRANA 3,540+ (1,616 civilians, 244 children). Internet 936+.

timeline.title: APRIL 7 TUE 8PM ET вҖ” <20 HRS
timeline.body: 4th deadline. 3 prior blinks. P(follow-through) UP to 0.22 (Trump explicitly refuses to extend). Iran 10-pt = maximalist gap unbridgeable in hours. If strikes: $130+, 90M without power, Houthi Bab al-Mandab. If blinks: credibility DESTROYED.

timeline.title: Month 2
timeline.body: Islamabad Accord 2-phase framework exists but Iran demands permanent deal. War Powers 60-day clock expires Apr 28-29. Attrition if Tue passes.

timeline.title: D39 Apr 7 вҖ” Kharg struck
timeline.body: US CENTCOM precision strike on >90 military targets on Kharg Island pre-dawn Apr 7. Naval mine storage, missile bunkers, IRGC sites destroyed. Oil terminal infrastructure deliberately untouched (controlled escalation signal). IRGC response: end of restraint on Gulf oil targets.

timeline.title: Month 3+
timeline.body: If strikes: humanitarian catastrophe -> intervention. If deal: phased de-escalation. War Powers forces Congressional vote.

timeline.title: Wild cards (D39)

timeline.title: D39 Apr 7 night вҖ” 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE
timeline.body: 90 min before 8PM ET deadline, Trump announced 2-week suspension of strikes contingent on Iran reopening Hormuz. Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir brokered. Iran SNSC/Araghchi accepted. VP Vance to lead Islamabad peace talks Friday. Iran 10-pt = 'workable basis.' Oil collapsed from $117 intraday to $109.50. Primary collapse risk: Israel unilateral strike (Haaretz source).

timeline.title: D41 Apr 9 вҖ” LEBANON FRACTURE POINT
timeline.body: Israel hit 100+ sites in Lebanon in 10 min вҖ” largest coordinated strike of the war. 254+ killed. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation. IRGC threatens Hormuz re-block. Parliament: 'STRONG responses.' Zero Iranian attacks D41 вҖ” ceasefire holding on Iran side but under extreme stress. Brent rebounding $97.39. Talks moved to Saturday Apr 12 (Vance+Witkoff+Kushner). Lebanon dispute = #1 collapse risk.

timeline.title: D42 Apr 10 вҖ” Iran delegation arrives Pakistan
timeline.body: Ceasefire holding. Iran delegation arrives in Islamabad for scheduled talks. Trump warns of renewed/intensified strikes if no deal. Israel continues Lebanon operations вҖ” 300+ killed in Wednesday's strikes. Hormuz still blocked. Brent ~$96.

timeline.title: D43 Apr 11 вҖ” MARATHON TALKS + HORMUZ MINE-CLEARING
timeline.body: 21-hour marathon talks BEGIN in Islamabad with Vance + Witkoff + Kushner + Iran delegation. US Navy destroyers USS Peterson + USS Murphy attempt Hormuz mine-clearing transit. IRGC threatens ships, launches UAV. Disputed if transit succeeded. Trump claims clearing begun. Lebanon: 2,020+ killed, 6,436 wounded.

timeline.title: D44 Apr 12 вҖ” TALKS FAILED, BLOCKADE HINTED

Ghalibaf blames US 'trust' failure. Trump hints NAVAL BLOCKADE via Truth Social. Ceasefire technically holds through Apr 21 but collapse risk surging to 38%. Brent $95.20.

timeline_fa.title: D41 Apr 9 вҖ” LEBANON FRACTURE POINT
timeline_fa.body: Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„ ЫұЫ°Ы°+ ШіШ§ЫҢШӘ ШҜШұ Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ЫұЫ° ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮЩҮ. ЫІЫөЫҙ+ Ъ©ШҙШӘЩҮ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШӘЩҮШ§Щ… ЩҶЩӮШ¶ ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі. ШіЩҫШ§ЩҮ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш§ЩҶШіШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…Ш¬ШҜШҜ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ. Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші: 'ЩҫШ§ШіШ® Щ…ШӯЪ©Щ….' ШөЩҒШұ ШӯЩ…Щ„ЩҮ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШұЩҲШІ ЫҙЫұ. Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ ЫұЫІ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ (ЩҲЩҶШі+ЩҲЫҢШӘЪ©Ш§ЩҒ+Ъ©ЩҲШҙЩҶШұ). ШЁШұЩҶШӘ $Ы№Ы·.ЫіЫ№. Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ = ШұЫҢШіЪ© Ыұ ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ.

timeline_fa.title: D42 ЫұЫ° ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” ЩҮЫҢШҰШӘ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ

timeline_fa.body: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ЫІЫұ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҮ ШҙШұЩҲШ№. ЩҲЩҶШі+ЩҲЫҢШӘЪ©Ш§ЩҒ+Ъ©ЩҲШҙЩҶШұ. ЩҶШ§ЩҲШҙЪ©ЩҶвҖҢ USS Peterson + USS Murphy Щ…ЫҢЩҶвҖҢШұЩҲШЁЫҢ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ. ШіЩҫШ§ЩҮ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ + UAV. Ш§Ш®ШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ ШҜШұ Щ…ЩҲЩҒЩӮЫҢШӘ. Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЫІЩ¬Ы°ЫІЫ°+.

timeline_fa.title: D44 ЫұЫІ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘШҢ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ
timeline_fa.body: Щ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘЩҶ ЫІЫұ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҮ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҶШӘЫҢШ¬ЩҮ. ЩҲЩҶШі: 'Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҶЩҫШ°ЫҢШұЩҒШӘ.' ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ: ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҢ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІШҢ Ш§ЩҲШұШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҲЩ…ШҢ ШӘШӯШұЫҢЩ…ШҢ ШәШұШ§Щ…ШӘ. ЩӮШ§Щ„ЫҢШЁШ§ЩҒ: 'Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Ш№ШӘЩ…Ш§ШҜ.' ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШӘШ§ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШұЫҢШіЪ© ЫіЫёЩӘ.

timeline_fa.title: D45 ЫұЫі ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜ
timeline_fa.body: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШЁЩҶШ§ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ. ШіЩҶШӘЪ©Ш§Щ… ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ: 'ШҜШІШҜЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ.' ШЁШұЫҢШӘШ§ЩҶЫҢШ§/ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶШіЩҮ/Ш§ШіЩҫШ§ЩҶЫҢШ§/ШӘШұЪ©ЫҢЩҮ ШұШҜ. ЪҶЫҢЩҶ Щ…ШӯЪ©ЩҲЩ…. ШЁШұЩҶШӘ ~$ЫұЫ°ЫІ (+ЫёЩӘ). ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ Ы·. Ыё ШұЩҲШІ ШӘШ§ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„.

timeline_fa.title: D46 ЫұЫҙ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШұЩҲШІ Ыұ + ШҜЫҢЩҫЩ„Щ…Ш§ШіЫҢ
timeline_fa.body: Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„. ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЩҲЫҢЫҢ вҖ” Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…ШӘ ЩҶЪ©ШұШҜ. Ыҙ+ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ Ш№ШЁЩҲШұ (BBC). ШӘШұЪ©ЫҢЩҮ: ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ЫҙЫө-Ы¶Ы° ШұЩҲШІЩҮ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ. Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„-Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ (Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШІ ЫұЫ№Ы№Ыі). ШӯШІШЁвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ Щ…Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩҒ. Щ…ШөШұ DC. ШЁШұЩҶШӘ $Ы№Ы¶.ЫҙЫё. ЩҮЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ыҙ.Ы¶ (вҶ‘).

timeline_fa.title: D47 ЫұЫө ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ЩҶШІШҜЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ' + Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ $ЫІЫ·Ы°B + Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ
timeline_fa.body: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ Fox Business: 'ЩҶШІШҜЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ ЩҶШІШҜЫҢЪ©.' Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ $ЫІЫ·Ы°B Ш®ШіШ§ШұШӘ вҖ” ЩӮЫҢЩ…ШӘвҖҢЪҜШ°Ш§ШұЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ Ъ©ШіШЁвҖҢЩҲЪ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ (ЫұЫҙ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„). Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ-Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„ 'ШіШ§ШІЩҶШҜЩҮ.' ШЁШұЩҶШӘ $Ы№Ыө.Ы·ЫІШҢ WTI $Ы№Ыұ.Ыө (-ЫёЩӘ). ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ Ы№ вҖ” Ы¶ ШұЩҲШІ. ЩҮЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ыө.Ы° (вҶ‘). ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫІЫҙЩӘ (вҶ‘). ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЫіЫ¶ЩӘ (вҶ“).

timeline_fa.title: D48 ЫұЫ¶ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ вҖ” Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ + ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ + ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ
timeline_fa.body: ШұШҰЫҢШі Ш§ШұШӘШҙ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШЁШ§ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ. Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶЫҢ: 'ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ШЁШІШұЪҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ.' ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ: Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU. AP: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ.' Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ. ЩҫШӘШұЩҲШҙЫҢЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ. Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШұЩҲШІ Ыі ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЩҲЫҢЫҢ. ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ. ШЁШұЩҶШӘ $Ы№Ыҙ.ЫёЫ№. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ ЫұЫ° вҖ” Ыө ШұЩҲШІ. ЩҮЩ…ЪҜШұШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ыө.Ы·. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫіЫұЩӘ = ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЫіЫұЩӘ вҖ” Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ ШЁШ§Шұ Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Ceasefire collapses / Escalation
scenarioProbabilities.detail: DOWN from 36%. Munir in Tehran with US proposal is highest-level mediation since war began. 'In principle' extension (AP). Trump 'amazing two days.' White House optimism. Still risks: nuclear gap (5-yr vs 20-yr) not bridged; Iran counter-threat on Gulf/Red Sea; 5 days to expiry.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Stalled / Protracted standoff
scenarioProbabilities.detail: DOWN from 23%. 'In principle' extension + Munir in Tehran = both sides clearly moving toward resolution. If deal announced in 'amazing two days,' this collapses further. Turkey 45-60 day extension still available but now less needed.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.detail: UP from 24% вҖ” NOW TIED WITH COLLAPSE for first time. Munir in Tehran with nuclear breakthrough hopes. 'In principle' extension. Trump 'amazing two days.' White House 'feels good.' Iran engaging on messages. Key remaining gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr nuclear freeze and HEU disposal method.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Declared victory / Withdrawal
scenarioProbabilities.detail: Trump 'beaten them militarily, totally' (Fox Business). 'Mission accomplished' framing ready if deal announced in next 48 hours. Oil $90.72 = domestic cover. Unchanged вҖ” subsumed into deal track.

scenarioProbabilities.label: International intervention
scenarioProbabilities.detail: Coalition fracturing. UN 'no military solution.' China watching. Pakistan mediating. Could force multilateral framework. Unchanged.

scenarioProbabilities.label: Regime fracture
scenarioProbabilities.detail: DOWN from 2%. Iran regime actively managing via Munir meeting, messages through Pakistan, business internet concession. Not fracturing вҖ” negotiating. Very low probability.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі / ШӘШҙШҜЫҢШҜ
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫіЫ¶ЩӘ. Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ + ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ + ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ.' Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ + ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ + Ыө ШұЩҲШІ.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: ШЁЩҶвҖҢШЁШіШӘ / ШӘЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Ш·ЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩҶЫҢ
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЫіЩӘ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ + Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ = ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Ш·ШұЩҒ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩ…ШӘ ШӯЩ„. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ЫІ ШұЩҲШІ' = ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩҶЩҮ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: Ш§ЩҒШІШ§ЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЫҙЩӘ вҖ” ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ ШЁШ§Шұ Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ ШЁШ§ ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ. Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ.' Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ. ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ШЁШ§ЩӮЫҢ: Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ + ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲШІЫҢ / Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…' = ЪҶШ§ШұЪҶЩҲШЁ 'Щ…Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұЫҢШӘ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜ.' ЩҶЩҒШӘ $Ы№Ы°.Ы·ЫІ = ЩҫЩҲШҙШҙ ШіЫҢШ§ШіЫҢ.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: Щ…ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҮ ШЁЫҢЩҶвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ…Щ„Щ„ЫҢ
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: Ш§ШҰШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘЩҮ. ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢ. ЪҶЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШёШ§ШұЩҮвҖҢЪҜШұ. ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШӘШәЫҢЫҢШұ.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.label: ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ШұЪҳЫҢЩ…
scenarioProbabilities_fa.detail: Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЩӘ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ШұЪҳЫҢЩ… Щ…ШҜЫҢШұЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҶЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЪ©ЩҶШҜ.

theoryEvaluation.title: MUNIR IN TEHRAN = HIGHEST-LEVEL MEDIATION SINCE WAR BEGAN
theoryEvaluation.body: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir arriving in Tehran (not Islamabad) is qualitatively different from any previous diplomatic move. This is the head of Pakistan's military вҖ” who also controls Pakistan's ISI and has direct channel to Iranian IRGC leadership вҖ” physically in Tehran. This is a back-channel that bypasses civilian diplomatic constraints. Pakistani mediators are 'optimistic about a major breakthrough on nuclear front' (Al Jazeera). The nuclear programme is the core sticking point вҖ” if Pakistan's military chief is hand-delivering a US proposal on nuclear terms, this is as serious as it gets before a deal announcement.

theoryEvaluation.title: 'IN PRINCIPLE' EXTENSION + TRUMP 'AMAZING TWO DAYS' = DEAL WITHIN 48 HOURS OR EXTENSION
theoryEvaluation.body: The two signals are complementary not contradictory: AP's 'in principle' extension means both sides have agreed not to let the clock run out; Trump saying 'not thinking about extending' means the US goal is a deal announcement, not a bare extension. These are consistent: Trump wants to announce a deal in the next two days, and the 'in principle' extension ensures he has the space to do so without the ceasefire formally collapsing at midnight Apr 21. The White House saying 'feels good about prospects' is the clearest positive signal since Apr 7. Watch for formal Round 2 announcement in Islamabad today or tomorrow.

theoryEvaluation.title: NUCLEAR GAP NOW DEFINED: 5-YR VS 20-YR вҖ” AND 440KG HEU
theoryEvaluation.body: The nuclear sticking point has now been publicly quantified: Iran likely accepting ~5 years of enrichment freeze; US wants ~20 years. The gap between 5 and 20 years is large but not uncrossable вҖ” in the 2015 JCPOA, the timeline was 15 years. A 10-year compromise is the obvious bridge. More difficult: what happens to Iran's ~440kg of highly enriched uranium (up to 60% and 20% purity). Options: ship it out (Russia, as in 2015), dilute it in-country (slower, verifiable), or irreversible conversion. This is the operationally hardest part. Watch Munir's proposal on both timelines.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRAN COUNTER-THREAT ON GULF/RED SEA/OMAN = ESCALATION CARD, NOT ACTION
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran threatening to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman AND Red Sea shipping is a public signal that Iran still has escalation tools it hasn't used. Critically: zero action on this threat through blockade Day 3. Iran is using the threat as negotiating leverage вҖ” 'give us a deal or we make the blockade mutual and global.' This is actually a deal-oriented behavior: you only threaten escalation if you expect negotiation to prevent it. If Iran intended to escalate, they would act, not announce. The threat itself is evidence of continued diplomatic calculation.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ = ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШіШ·Шӯ Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢЪҜШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш¬ЩҶЪҜ
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ШұШҰЫҢШі Ш§ШұШӘШҙ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ вҖ” ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ. Ъ©Ш§ЩҶШ§Щ„ ЩҫШҙШӘвҖҢЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ЩҶШёШ§Щ…ЫҢ-ЩҶШёШ§Щ…ЫҢ (ISI-IRGC). Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢШ§ЩҶ: 'Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ШЁШІШұЪҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ.' ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ = Щ…ШұЪ©ШІЫҢвҖҢШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩӮШ·ЩҮ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ. Ш§ЪҜШұ Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ШұШ§ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜ = Ш¬ШҜЫҢвҖҢШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ ШҜЫҢЩҫЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘЫҢЪ©.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ + 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ' = Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҮ ЫҢШ§ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ШҜШұ ЫҙЫё ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ AP: ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Ш·ШұЩҒ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҶШҜ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ШөЩҒШұ ЩҶШұШіШҜ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҒЪ©Шұ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩ…': ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩҶЩҮ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ. ШіШ§ШІЪҜШ§Шұ: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ = ЩҒШ¶Ш§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҮ. 'Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ.' ЩҶШёШ§ШұШӘ: Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… ШұШіЩ…ЫҢ ШҜЩҲШұ ЫІ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҲШІ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШҜШ§.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШӘШ№ШұЫҢЩҒ ШҙШҜ: Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ + ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӢ Ыө ШіШ§Щ„ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒШӣ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ШЁШұШ¬Ш§Щ… ЫІЫ°ЫұЫө = ЫұЫө ШіШ§Щ„. ЩҫЩ„: ЫұЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ШіШ®ШӘвҖҢШӘШұ: ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… Ш§ЩҲШұШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҲЩ…. ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§: Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҮ ШұЩҲШіЫҢЩҮ / ШұЩӮЫҢЩӮвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ / ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘвҖҢЩҶШ§ЩҫШ°ЫҢШұ. ЩҶШёШ§ШұШӘ: ЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШұЩҲЫҢ ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ = Ш§ЩҮШұЩ… Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮШҢ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜ Ш®Щ„ЫҢШ¬ + ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ…Ш§ЩҶ + ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢ ШіШұШ® ШұШ§ Щ…ШіШҜЩҲШҜ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. Ш§Щ…Ш§ Ыі ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…. ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ = Ш§ЩҮШұЩ… Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ. Ш§ЪҜШұ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ШіШӘ ШӘШҙШҜЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ШұШҜ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ШұШҜ. ШұЩҒШӘШ§Шұ Щ…ШӯШ§ШіШЁЩҮвҖҢЪҜШұШ§ЩҶЩҮ = Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ ШҜЫҢЩҫЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘЫҢЪ©.

endstate.title: Most likely вҖ” TIED (31%/31%)
endstate.body: DEAL and COLLAPSE now tied at 31% вҖ” first time in the conflict. Munir in Tehran + 'in principle' extension pushed deal to highest level since original ceasefire. Nuclear gap (5-yr vs 20-yr) + HEU disposal + 5 days to expiry keep collapse risk elevated. Next 48 hours decisive: Trump 'amazing two days' means either deal announcement or collapse imminent.

endstate.title: Deal (31%) вҖ” NOW TIED FOR FIRST
endstate.body: Negotiated deal. UP dramatically from 24% to 31%. Drivers: Munir in Tehran with nuclear breakthrough hopes; 'in principle' extension (AP); Trump 'amazing two days ahead'; White House 'feels good'; Iran messages through Pakistan. Key remaining gaps: nuclear freeze duration (5 vs 20yr), HEU disposal method, $270B vs sanctions relief substitute.

endstate.title: Third (22%)
endstate.body: Stalled/frozen conflict. DOWN from 23%. 'In principle' extension means both sides chose not to let clock run out = stall-by-choice rather than genuine progress. But Munir in Tehran + Trump 'two days' = stall less likely than deal or collapse.

endstate.title: Fourth (10%/5%/1%)
endstate.body: Victory 10% (Trump 'beaten them militarily, totally' Fox Business = 'mission accomplished' framing ready; oil $90.72 = domestic cover). Intervention 5% (allies still refusing). Fracture 1% (DOWN from 2% вҖ” Iran actively negotiating, not fracturing).

endstate_fa.title: Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ: ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЫіЫұЩӘ / ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫіЫұЩӘ
endstate_fa.body: Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЩҶ ШЁШ§Шұ: ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩҲ ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲЫҢ. Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ + ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ = ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШЁЩҮ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§Щ„ ШұШіЫҢШҜ. ЫҙЫё ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ШўЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘЫҢ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ' = ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ ЩӮШұЫҢШЁвҖҢШ§Щ„ЩҲЩӮЩҲШ№.

endstate_fa.title: ШЁЩҶвҖҢШЁШіШӘ ЫІЫІЩӘ
endstate_fa.body: Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЫіЩӘ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ = ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Ш·ШұЩҒ ШӘШөЩ…ЫҢЩ… ЪҜШұЩҒШӘЩҶШҜ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ ШөЩҒШұ ЩҶШұШіШҜ. Ш§Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ + 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ' = ШЁЩҶвҖҢШЁШіШӘ Ъ©Щ…ШӘШұ Ш§ШІ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұЩҲЩҫШ§ШҙЫҢ.

endstate_fa.title: ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲШІЫҢ ЫұЫ°ЩӘ / Щ…ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҮ ЫөЩӘ
endstate_fa.body: ЩҫЫҢШұЩҲШІЫҢ ЫұЫ°ЩӘ: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…' = 'Щ…Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұЫҢШӘ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜ.' ЩҶЩҒШӘ $Ы№Ы°.Ы·ЫІ = ЩҫЩҲШҙШҙ. Щ…ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҮ ЫөЩӘ. ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ЫұЩӘ (Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЩӘ).

endstate_fa.title: ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШӘШ№ШұЫҢЩҒ ШҙШҜ
endstate_fa.body: Ыө ШіШ§Щ„ vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU. ЪҜШІЫҢЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§: ШұЩҲШіЫҢЩҮ / ШұЩӮЫҢЩӮвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ / ШӘШЁШҜЫҢЩ„. ЩҫЩ„: ЫұЫ° ШіШ§Щ„ (ШЁШұШ¬Ш§Щ… ЫұЫө ШіШ§Щ„). Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ШұШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜ.

shippingRoutes.detail: Dead. Blockade Monday = complete maritime isolation. Hormuz sealed (mines + blockade). Dubai inactive.
Ceasefire holds but talks failure = no progress on border normalization. Turkey cautious.
BEST option. Land route unaffected by naval blockade. Ceasefire preserves grid/roads. Internet blocks coordination.
Pakistan hosted failed talks. Now: blockade = Pakistan route uncertain. Iraq transit operational.
Hormuz blockade Monday = Oman bypass dead. Naval theater.

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: Щ…ШұШҜЩҮ. Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ = Ш§ЩҶШІЩҲШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ. ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ Щ…ЩҮШұ + Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ.
ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ = ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ.
ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢШІШЁШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘвҖҢШ®ЩҲШұШҜЩҮ. ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШҜЫҢЩҫЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘЫҢЪ© ШӘШӯШӘ ЩҒШҙШ§Шұ.

Tehran publishers and warehouses SHOULD apply now. Iran Chamber warns $80M/day digital economy losses = strong incentive for expansion. Citizens still cut off вҖ” no timeline for general.

If deal announced in 'amazing two days': accessible in 1-2 weeks. CONTACT TEHRAN WAREHOUSE NOW via all channels вҖ” business internet may be active.

Printing: B1. ЫұЩ¬ЫұЫІЫё+ Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ. ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§ЩҶ (ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ Ы№).
New titles: Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ. ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ = Ш§ШІ ШіШұЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ ШӘШҜШұЫҢШ¬ЫҢ.
Warehouse: ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШіШ§Щ„Щ…. Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ: Ыұ-ЫІ ЩҮЩҒШӘЩҮ.
Distribution: Щ…ШұШҜЩҮ. Щ…ШіЫҢШұЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶЫҢ (Ш§ШұЩ…ЩҶШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮШӘШұЫҢЩҶ). ЩҶЩҒШӘ $Ы№Ыұ = ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ.
impactIranfarhang: SUPPLY CHAIN: 100% SEVERED - DAY 48. DEAL IN 48 HOURS POSSIBLE вҖ” ACT NOW. Munir in Tehran with nuclear breakthrough. 'In principle' extension (AP). Trump 'amazing two days.' impactIranfarhang_fa: 100% ЩӮШ·Ш№ - ШұЩҲШІ ЫҙЫ·. ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЪҶШҙЩ…вҖҢШ§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮШЁЩҲШҜ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ЫІ ШұЩҲШІ.' Щ…ШіЫҢШұЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШӘШ§ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ + Щ…ЫҢЩҶвҖҢШұЩҲШЁЫҢ Щ…ШұШҜЩҮ. Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ ЫұЩ¬ЫұЫІЫё+.

humanitarian: Internet: BUSINESS PARTIAL вҖ” DAY 3. IRAN CHAMBER OF COMMERCE WARNS $80M/DAY LOSSES. Business internet partial now in Day 3 (since Apr 14). Iran Chamber of Commerce warned Apr 13: internet restrictions costing $80M/day in digital economy losses (IntelliNews). Citizens still cut off. State telecom firms offering 'pro' packages for business applications through Iran Chamber of Commerce. 1,152+ hours total (48 days) вҖ” longest nationwide internet disruption ever recorded. $30-40M direct + $80M digital economy = $110M+/day full cost.
Displacement: 330,000+ Iran. Lebanon ~1M. 363+ Bushehr to Russia. Ceasefire = no new Iran displacement (9 days). Lebanon front ongoing вҖ” ceasefire does NOT cover Lebanon.

Infrastructure: 85,000+ structures damaged. No new damage D40-D47 (9 days). Ceasefire = preservation. Deal track = reconstruction framework possible. Iran claims $270B total losses (direct + indirect).
Nuclear: 363+ Bushehr evacuees. IAEA monitoring. Nuclear gap remains THE core issue: US wants 20-yr enrichment suspension; Iran offered 3-5 yr. No bridge visible.
Medical: HRANA: 3,636 killed (frozen Apr 7 вҖ” internet blackout limits verification). 26,500+ wounded. Lebanon: 2,055+ killed, 6,500+ wounded. No new verified deaths under ceasefire D40-D47.

Economic: Oil Brent $94.89, WTI $90.72. Gas ~$4.08. Iran petrochemicals suspended ($54M/day offline). Blockade: $435M/day total eliminated. Business internet partial Day 3 easing some losses. 20,000 vessels stranded. Munir in Tehran = most significant economic relief signal since ceasefire.

diplomacy: PAKISTAN ARMY CHIEF MUNIR IN TEHRAN вҖ” NUCLEAR DEAL PUSH. General Asim Munir arrived in Tehran Apr 15 evening (local) with a fresh US proposal. Pakistani sources: mediators 'optimistic about major breakthrough' on nuclear programme. Nuclear gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze. Iran's 440kg HEU stockpile under discussion. Munir carries ISI-IRGC back-channel credibility no civilian diplomat can match.

'IN PRINCIPLE' CEASEFIRE EXTENSION вҖ” NOT FORMAL, BUT BOTH SIDES OPTED IN. AP (regional officials): US/Iran have 'in principle agreement' to extend ceasefire beyond Apr 21. Senior US official to CNBC: 'not formally agreed.' Trump Times of Israel: 'not thinking about extending' + 'amazing two days ahead.' White House: 'feels good about prospects of a deal.' Iran: 'several messages exchanged through Pakistan.' Iran spokesperson: positions 'expressed in those exchanges.'

BLOCKADE DAY 3 вҖ” NO CONFRONTATION. IRAN COUNTER-THREAT UNACTED. Third straight day no incident. 10+ ships turned back. Iran threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman AND Red Sea if blockade continues вҖ” escalation rhetoric with zero action = negotiating signal. De facto coexistence continuing.

IRAN PETROCHEMICALS SUSPENDED вҖ” NEW ECONOMIC PRESSURE. National Petrochemical Company halted all exports (Apr 13 order, announced Apr 15). $13B/yr industry (~$54M/day). Reason: prioritize domestic supply after South Pars strikes. Combined with $435M/day blockade losses: Iran's economic pain deepening fast вҖ” adds urgency to deal.

MULTI-TRACK DIPLOMACY AT PEAK DENSITY: Pakistan (Munir in Tehran), Turkey (45-60 day extension offer), Egypt (FM in DC), Israel-Lebanon (next round Washington in weeks), White House ('feels good'). More simultaneous diplomatic tracks active than any day since ceasefire began Apr 7.
diplomacy_fa: Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ вҖ” ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ. ШұШҰЫҢШі Ш§ШұШӘШҙ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§. Щ…ЫҢШ§ЩҶШ¬ЫҢШ§ЩҶ: 'ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ ШЁШІШұЪҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ.' ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ: Ыө vs ЫІЫ° ШіШ§Щ„. ЫҙЫҙЫ° Ъ©ЫҢЩ„ЩҲЪҜШұЩ… HEU. Ъ©Ш§ЩҶШ§Щ„ ISI-IRGC.

ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ вҖ” ШұШіЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ. AP: ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Ш·ШұЩҒ. Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ… Ш§ШұШҙШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§: ШұШіЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶШҙШҜЩҮ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: 'ШҜЩҲ ШұЩҲШІ ШҙЪҜЩҒШӘвҖҢШ§ЩҶЪҜЫҢШІ.' Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ: 'ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…вҖҢЩҮШ§ ШұШҜ ЩҲ ШЁШҜЩ„ ШҙШҜ.'

Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШұЩҲШІ Ыі вҖ” ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЩҲЫҢЫҢ. ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш¶ШҜЩ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…. ЫұЫ°+ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘЩҮ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ш®Щ„ЫҢШ¬ + Ш№Щ…Ш§ЩҶ + ШіШұШ®. Ш§Щ…Ш§ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш§ЩӮШҜШ§Щ…ЫҢ = ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ.

ЩҫШӘШұЩҲШҙЫҢЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ вҖ” ЩҒШҙШ§Шұ Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЫҢ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ. ЫұЫі Щ…ЫҢЩ„ЫҢШ§ШұШҜ ШҜЩ„Ш§Шұ/ШіШ§Щ„. $ЫөЫҙM/ШұЩҲШІ. Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЩҲЫҢШӘ ШӘШЈЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЫҢ. ШЁШ§ $ЫҙЫіЫөM/ШұЩҲШІ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ: ШҜШұШҜ Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЫҢ ШӘШіШұЫҢШ№ ШҙШҜ.

ШҜЫҢЩҫЩ„Щ…Ш§ШіЫҢ ЪҶЩҶШҜЩ…ШіЫҢШұЫҢ ШҜШұ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШӘШұШ§Ъ©Щ…: ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ (Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ) + ШӘШұЪ©ЫҢЩҮ (ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ) + Щ…ШөШұ (DC) + Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„-Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ (ШҜЩҲШұ ШЁШ№ШҜЫҢ) + Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ Ш®ЩҲШҙШЁЫҢЩҶ. ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұЫҢЩҶ Щ…ШіЫҢШұ ЩҮЩ…ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Ы· ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: Ъ©Ш§ШәШ° ЩҲ Щ…ШұЪ©ШЁ: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ы·Ы°ЩӘ+ Ъ©Ш§ШәШ° ЪҶШ§Щҫ ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ + ШӘШӯШұЫҢЩ… = ШІЩҶШ¬ЫҢШұЩҮ ЩӮШ·Ш№. Ъ©Ш§ШұШ®Ш§ЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЫІЫ°-ЫіЫ°ЩӘ ШёШұЩҒЫҢШӘ.
ШёШұЩҒЫҢШӘ ЪҶШ§Щҫ: ЪҶШ§ЩҫШ®Ш§ЩҶЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲШЁ. ЩӮШ·Ш№ Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ Ы·Ы¶Ыё+ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ = ЩҫЫҢШҙвҖҢЪҶШ§Щҫ ШҜЫҢШ¬ЫҢШӘШ§Щ„ ЩҶШ§Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ. ЫёЫ°-Ы№Ы°ЩӘ Ъ©Ш§ЩҮШҙ.
ШӘЩҲШІЫҢШ№: ШҙШЁЪ©ЩҮ (ШҙЩҮШұ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ШәЫҢШұЩҮ) Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„. ЫёЫІ,Ы°Ы°Ы°+ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўШіЫҢШЁ. ЩҒШұЩҲШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ ШЁШіШӘЩҮ. ШіЩҒШ§ШұШҙ ШўЩҶЩ„Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶШ§Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ.
ШіШ§ЩҶШіЩҲШұ: Ш§ШұШҙШ§ШҜ Ш§ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШёШұЩҒЫҢШӘ ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө. Щ…Ш¬ЩҲШІ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ ШӘШ№Щ„ЫҢЩӮ.
ШЁЩӮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШ§ШҙШұШ§ЩҶ: ЩҶШ§ШҙШұШ§ЩҶ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЪ©/Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· ШЁШӯШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЫҢ. Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҶШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШЁЩҮШӘШұ. Ш§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ш§ШҜШәШ§Щ…/ШӘШ№Ш·ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ ЩҫШі Ш§ШІ Ш¬ЩҶЪҜ.
Ш¬Ш§ЫҢЪҜШІЫҢЩҶ ШҜЫҢШ¬ЫҢШӘШ§Щ„: Ш·Ш§ЩӮЪҶЩҮШҢ ЩҒЫҢШҜЫҢШЁЩҲ ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„. ЩҫШі ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШӘ Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ ШіШұЫҢШ№вҖҢШӘШұ. Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШҜШ§ЩҶШҙЪҜШ§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҶШіШ®ЩҮ ЩҒЫҢШІЫҢЪ©ЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ.

ШҜЩҲШұШӘШұЫҢЩҶ. CIMB + Maybank. Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮЩҮ ШўШІШ§ШҜ. ШЁЩҮШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШұЫҢШіЪ©вҖҢЪҜШұЫҢШІЫҢ.

hormuzReopeningTimeline.detail: EXPANDING: 7+ countries + Iraq D37. WSO = calmer. April 6 binary.
Maham 3/7 mines confirmed. Clearance requires specialized MCM vessels. US + UK + France MCM assets in region but not deployed to clear yet.
Lloyd's JWC listed entire Persian Gulf. War risk premium 3.8% of hull value (from 0.02% pre-war). Won't normalize until mines cleared + 90 days incident-free.
Requires: mines cleared, insurance normalized, port infrastructure repaired, Bab al-Mandab safe (Houthi factor). 1,000+ stranded tankers to process.

hormuzReopeningTimeline_fa.detail: ЩҒШ№Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ~Ыө-ЫұЫ° ШЁШ§ Ш№ЩҲШ§ШұШ¶ ЫҢЩҲШўЩҶЫҢ. ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ: ЪҶШ§ШұЪҶЩҲШЁ ЪҶЩҶШҜШ¬Ш§ЩҶШЁЩҮ + Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҲШұШӘ.
Щ…ЩҮШ§Щ… Ыі/Ы· ШӘШЈЫҢЫҢШҜ. ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҮШ§ЫҢ MCM ШӘШ®ШөШөЫҢ.
Щ„ЩҲЫҢШҜШІ Ъ©Щ„ Ш®Щ„ЫҢШ¬. ШӯЩӮвҖҢШЁЫҢЩ…ЩҮ Ыі.ЫёЩӘ (Ш§ШІ Ы°.Ы°ЫІЩӘ). ЩҶЫҢШ§ШІ: Щ…ЫҢЩҶвҖҢШұЩҲШЁЫҢ + Ы№Ы° ШұЩҲШІ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШӯШ§ШҜШ«ЩҮ.
Щ…ЫҢЩҶ + ШЁЫҢЩ…ЩҮ + ШЁЩҶШҜШұ + ШЁШ§ШЁвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШҜШЁ. Ыұ,Ы°Ы°Ы°+ ЩҶЩҒШӘЪ©Шҙ Щ…Ш№Ш·Щ„.

strandedCargo.location: Jebel Ali Free Zone + Hamriyah Free Zone
strandedCargo.detail: Most cargo insured under pre-war marine policies. Claims processing delayed вҖ” Lloyd's overwhelmed. Perishables (~15% by value) written off. Non-perishable goods safe in bonded storage but incurring daily storage fees (~$150/container/day).
strandedCargo.detail_fa: Ш§Ъ©Ш«Шұ ШЁШ§Шұ ШЁЫҢЩ…ЩҮ. ЩҫШұШҜШ§ШІШҙ Ш®ШіШ§ШұШӘ ШӘШЈШ®ЫҢШұ. ЩҒШ§ШіШҜШҙШҜЩҶЫҢ (~ЫұЫөЩӘ) Ш§ШІ ШҜШіШӘ ШұЩҒШӘЩҮ. ШәЫҢШұЩҒШ§ШіШҜШҙШҜЩҶЫҢ ШҜШұ Ш§ЩҶШЁШ§Шұ Ш§Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШІЫҢЩҶЩҮ ШұЩҲШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ (~$ЫұЫөЫ°/Ъ©Ш§ЩҶШӘЫҢЩҶШұ/ШұЩҲШІ).

insuranceCostIndex.note: D38: Crowne Plaza Bahrain drone + USN Fifth Fleet missile. IRGC 'new order' = permanent Gulf posture. Hull 13.5% = UNINSURABLE. War risk 5.3%.

cumulativeByCountry._note: Estimated cumul ~3,361 missiles / ~5,298 drones through D38. D38: Khademi killed, coordinated barrage, UAE MoD cumul: 519/26/2,210.

estimatedStockpiles.note: Based on IISS/CSIS pre-war estimates minus confirmed expenditure (~3,185 fired). Assumes no resupply.
Based on IRGC D16 claim 'most weapons cache intact, using decade-old missiles.' If true, Iran has 4-9 months of sustained fire.
Midpoint. Accounts for some resupply from North Korea/China pipeline + hidden stockpiles minus battle damage.

oilScenarioBands.note: Projections based on Goldman Sachs ($110 avg), Citi ($120+ if sustained), IEA worst-case. Ceasefire scenario assumes phased Hormuz reopening. Bab al-Mandab closure = both chokepoints blocked.
oilScenarioBands.note_fa: ЩҫЫҢШҙвҖҢШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ ШЁШұ Ш§ШіШ§Ші ЪҜЩ„ШҜЩ…ЩҶ ШіШ§Ъ©Ші ($110)ШҢ ШіЫҢШӘЫҢ ($120+)ШҢ IEA ШЁШҜШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ШӯШ§Щ„ШӘ. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі = ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЫҢ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„ЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ. ШЁШіШӘЩҶ ШЁШ§ШЁвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШҜШЁ = ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ ШӘЩҶЪҜЩҮ.

hormuzTransit.note: D47: ~4 vessels/day. BLOCKADE DAY 2 вҖ” cautious resumption. Small tankers testing CENTCOM inspection regime. WH signals talks 'next 2 days.' Iran: piracy claim. 200+ mines still deployed.
hormuzTransit.note_fa: ШұЩҲШІ ЫҙЫ·: ~Ыҙ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ/ШұЩҲШІ. ШұЩҲШІ ЫІ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ вҖ” Ш§ШІ ШіШұЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш·Ш§ЩҶЩҮ. Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҲЪҶЪ© ШұЪҳЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ШІШұШіЫҢ ШіЩҶШӘЪ©Ш§Щ… ШұШ§ ШўШІЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ. Ъ©Ш§Ш® ШіЩҒЫҢШҜ ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ Ъ©ШұШҜ.

ceasefireDeadline.label: April 21 ceasefire expiry
ceasefireDeadline.context: Trump-Iran 2-week ceasefire announced Apr 7 (Pakistan-brokered). Islamabad talks COLLAPSED Apr 12. BLOCKADE ACTIVE since Apr 14 10AM ET. Ceasefire Day 9 вҖ” 6 days to expiry. TRUMP SIGNALS TALKS 'NEXT 2 DAYS' (NY Post). WH: 'Islamabad AND Geneva under discussion.' Oil CRASHED 8% on signal.
ceasefireDeadline.context_fa: ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ЫІ ЩҮЩҒШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ. Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ. Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Ш§ШІ ЫұЫҙ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ШұЩҲШІ Ы№ вҖ” Ы¶ ШұЩҲШІ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ Ш·ЫҢ ЫІ ШұЩҲШІ ШўЫҢЩҶШҜЩҮ. ЩҶЩҒШӘ ЫёЩӘ ШіЩӮЩҲШ· Ъ©ШұШҜ.

branchIfDeal.detail: Likely phased: Hormuz reopening first, strikes pause, humanitarian corridors.
MCM vessels deploy. Safe passage expands to 30+ vessels/day.
Markets price in de-escalation. Gulf exports resume partially.
Insurance normalizes. Mines cleared. Bab al-Mandab safe.

Mass civilian casualties. International condemnation. UN emergency session.
Houthi likely closes Bab al-Mandab. Both chokepoints blocked. Global recession.
Coalition fractures. China/Russia escalate diplomacy. Ground ops on Kharg Island.

events.detail: US + Israel + GCC unified. UAE, Saudi, Qatar hosting US forces. Hormuz blocked by Iran.
Rejected war powers resolution. Gave Trump political cover.
First non-US allied death (CWO Frion). France: 'never' Hormuz during war.
Resigned: 'Iran not a threat.' First senior US official to break.
Saudi: 'right to military action' вҖ” warning to US. 12 FM joint statement.
Expelled US military attache. 22-country Hormuz coalition forming WITHOUT US.
Expelled Iranian ambassador. Proxy network fracturing.
All declined to join Hormuz coalition. US increasingly isolated.
Joint condemnation of strikes. Ghalibaf threatened attacks if islands occupied.
Called for 'immediate cessation' вҖ” multilateral language but no enforcement.
5-point peace plan. Great-power alternative framework bypassing US.

F-15E shot down = US losing aircraft. Norway FM: world leaders opt diplomacy not force. CMA CGM transit = Western business testing independent path. Israel pauses strikes for US rescue = coordination stress.
Kuwait 2 power/water shut + Shuwaikh + Ministries. Bahrain BAPCO. Iran civilian infra targeting.
Iran 10-pt maximalist counteroffer. Trump refuses to extend. IRGC defiance = 'helpless, stupid.' Wall St surged on hope. Markets vs reality mismatch. Khademi+Bagheri killed. IAEA 'deeply concerned.'

decapitationTracker.name: Ayatollah Khamenei
decapitationTracker.replacement: Mojtaba Khamenei (son) designated by Assembly of Experts D9. Absent since D8 вҖ” status unknown.
decapitationTracker.significance: Highest-value target. Decapitation triggered succession crisis. Mojtaba's absence raises questions.

decapitationTracker.name: Ali Larijani
decapitationTracker.replacement: No direct replacement. Diplomatic channel lost.
decapitationTracker.significance: Key back-channel figure. Death narrowed diplomatic options.

decapitationTracker.name: Soleimani (nephew)
decapitationTracker.significance: Symbolic вҖ” Soleimani name carries weight in IRGC.

decapitationTracker.name: Adm. Tangsiri
decapitationTracker.replacement: No confirmed successor. Safe passage expanding despite death = institutional not personal.
decapitationTracker.significance: Most significant naval decapitation. Designed the Hormuz blockade strategy.

decapitationTracker.name: ~40 senior officials
decapitationTracker.replacement: IRGC promoting from within. Command continuity maintained at institutional level.
decapitationTracker.significance: Cumulative loss. CENTCOM: 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed.

decapitationTracker.name: Kamal Kharazi
decapitationTracker.replacement: Wife killed. Back-channel to Pakistan disrupted. Diplomatic momentum damaged.
decapitationTracker.significance: Was overseeing the China-Pakistan peace plan channel. His wounding may derail the most promising diplomatic track.

decapitationTracker.name: Makram Atimi
decapitationTracker.replacement: Unknown. Several battalion commanders also killed. Central ballistic missile unit decapitated.
decapitationTracker.significance: Significant loss of missile command expertise. IDF confirmed kill in Kermanshah area along with battalion commanders.

decapitationTracker.name: Mojtaba Khamenei
decapitationTracker.replacement: N/A вҖ” he IS the replacement. Zolghadr named SNSC secretary D24 = institutional continuity without visible leader.
decapitationTracker.significance: 27 days absent. Written statement only (D13). No video. Speculation: injured, hiding, or dead. Regime functioning without visible head of state.

decapitationTracker.name: Maj Gen Majid Khademi
decapitationTracker.role: IRGC Intelligence Chief (effectively No.2 in IRGC)
decapitationTracker.replacement: No confirmed successor. IRGC intel apparatus decapitated. Coordinated barrage hours later = institutional continuity.
decapitationTracker.significance: Most senior IRGC kill since Khamenei. Intel chief = operational intelligence, counterintel, and covert ops leadership eliminated. Effectively No.2.

decapitationTracker.name: Asghar Bagheri
decapitationTracker.replacement: Killed alongside Khademi in precision strike. Quds Force external ops leadership eliminated.
decapitationTracker.significance: Quds Force = Iran's external operations arm. Combined with Khademi = dual decapitation of intel + external ops.
