dealAvailability.reasoning: TRUMP + IRAN ACCEPTED 2-WEEK CEASEFIRE (Apr 7 ~7PM ET, Pakistan-brokered). Trump calls Iran 10-pt 'workable basis.' FM Araghchi confirmed via Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir. VP Vance to lead Islamabad talks Fri. Mediator activity SURGE (Pakistan operational broker). Face-saving elements materialize (Pakistani guarantee, Hormuz coordination). Deal availability JUMP 0.18 -> 0.42. Still short of 0.6 вҖ” 2-week pause, not settlement; gap on NPT+sanctions; Israel decoupling risk.
dealAvailability.reasoning_fa: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЫұЫ° Щ…Ш§ШҜЩҮ = Щ…ЩҒШөЩ„вҖҢШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ЩҫШ§ШіШ® (specificity UP). Ш§Щ…Ш§ Щ…Ш§Ъ©ШіЫҢЩ…Ш§Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ: NPT + ШӘШӯШұЫҢЩ… + ШЁШ§ШІШіШ§ШІЫҢ = Щ…Ш§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ ШұШҜ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ. ШҙЪ©Ш§ЩҒ Ш№Щ…ЫҢЩӮвҖҢШӘШұ. DOWN 0.22->0.18.

usExitPressure.reasoning: Exit narrative crystallized: Trump can frame 2-week pause as 'Pakistan asked,' 'Hormuz reopening,' 'Iran 10-pt workable basis' вҖ” all face-saving exits. Pew 60% wrong still binds. Gas $4.12. 15 KIA. Duration fatigue D39. Wall St likely rally tomorrow. US exit pressure UP 0.57 -> 0.64.
usExitPressure.reasoning_fa: ЩҫЫҢЩҲ ЫөЫ№ЩӘ. ЫұЫө Ъ©ШҙШӘЩҮ. $Ыҙ.ЫұЫ°. ЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӘ F-15 = PR. ШЁШ§ШІШ§Шұ ШөШ№ЩҲШҜ. Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ 'ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶЩ….' TACO (4 ШЁШ§Шұ). ЫұЫ° Щ…Ш§ШҜЩҮ = Щ…Ш§ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§.

iranAcceptance.reasoning: Iran SNSC accepted 2-week ceasefire and agreed to Hormuz reopening coordination via Pakistan mediation вҖ” FIRST formal de-escalation step from Tehran in 39 days. Araghchi confirmed on behalf of Supreme National Security Council. Acceptance JUMP 0.08 -> 0.30. Still capped вҖ” 10-pt maximalism intact (NPT, sanctions, reparations unresolved), 2-week window = conditional pause not terms acceptance, IRGC 'outside region' rhetoric still live.
iranAcceptance.reasoning_fa: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЫұЫ° Щ…Ш§ШҜЩҮ Щ…Ш§Ъ©ШіЫҢЩ…Ш§Щ„ЫҢШіШӘ = Щ…ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§ЩҒШӘШӘШ§ШӯЫҢЩҮ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұЩҮ. NPT + ШӘШӯШұЫҢЩ… + ШЁШ§ШІШіШ§ШІЫҢ. Ш·ШұШӯ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ 'ШЁЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ШӯШҜ.' ШіЩҫШ§ЩҮ 'ШҜШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҮ.' DOWN 0.10->0.08. ШіШ®ШӘвҖҢШӘШұ.

escalationProximity.reasoning: Deadline averted. Power grid strikes SUSPENDED 14 days (0.88 -> 0.25). Hormuz reopening promised (0.67 -> 0.35). Kharg already hit but oil infra spared. Israel decoupling risk = residual (Haaretz source: IDF 'preparing extensive attack'). Escalation proximity DOWN 0.72 -> 0.42. NOT zero вҖ” Iran could freeze, Israel could strike unilaterally, Hormuz non-compliance = instant re-trigger.
escalationProximity.reasoning_fa: ЩҶЫҢШұЩҲЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШіЩҮвҖҢШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ <20 ШіШ§Ш№ШӘ. P=0.22 UP. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ ШұШҜ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ (0.88). Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЫұЫ° Щ…Ш§ШҜЩҮ = ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬. IAEA 'deeply concerned' (0.85). ШӘШҙШҜЫҢШҜ UP 0.68->0.72.

outcomeProbabilities.derivation_negotiated: DOWN from 0.18. Naval blockade = further from diplomacy. No talks. Allies refusing. Nuclear gap unbridgeable.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_escalation: UP from 0.28. Blockade Monday = direct confrontation risk. If Iran resists: naval war. IRGC 'act of war.'
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_protracted: DOWN from 0.38. Blockade accelerates timeline вҖ” less likely to remain protracted, more likely collapse or confrontation.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_intervention: UP from 0.10. Allies refusing blockade. China condemning. If maritime confrontation: international pressure surges.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_other: Regime fracture, coup, rogue IRGC action, Houthi Bab al-Mandab closure.

calibration.polymarketSource: Polymarket: ceasefire-holds ~18% (crashing). Deal by Apr 30 ~15-18%. Conflict-ends-Dec31 ~97%. $280M+ traded. Blockade active = bearish signal but Trump 'deal' talk providing floor.

historicalBaseRate.methodology: Of ~40 post-WWII asymmetric Middle East conflicts, ~35% resolved within 45 days (current D37). Base rate prior.

oilFuturesSignal.interpretation: Spot > futures = market expects crisis is TEMPORARY. Consistent with resolution within months, not years.

calibration.modelVsMarket: Model: ~28% negotiated resolution. Market near-term: ~18% ceasefire holds. Model more optimistic than market because of Pakistan 2nd round + Rubio Lebanon track. But blockade enforcement + 7-day countdown = strong bear case.

confidence.methodology: Ensemble: model-derived (15%) + market signal (~20% Polymarket, crashing) + historical base rate (35%) -> weighted 18%. DOWN from 22%. Naval blockade destroyed remaining diplomatic pathway. Allies refusing. No talks scheduled.

deadlineHistory.threat: April 7 Tue 8PM ET power grid strikes вҖ” EXPLICITLY REFUSES to extend
deadlineHistory.outcome: BLINKED 4th time. 90 min before 8PM ET Trump announced 2-week ceasefire on conversation with PM Sharif/FM Munir, contingent on Iran reopening Hormuz. Iran SNSC accepted. Peace talks Islamabad Fri (Vance lead).

trumpPattern.methodology: Bayesian: prior P(follow-through) = 0.70. 3 observed blinks вҶ’ posterior ~0.16. ADJUSTED UP to 0.22 for: (1) Trump explicitly refuses to extend (different signal from 'good chance'), (2) South Pars energy war precedent already set, (3) Iran 10-pt maximalist = no off-ramp, (4) credibility pressure = 4th blink would be devastating, (5) Iran military defiance = no compliance signal.

sensitivity.input: If a credible deal proposal emerges
sensitivity.interpretation: A credible counter-proposal from Iran would have the largest single impact on resolution probability.

sensitivity.input: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate
sensitivity.interpretation: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate (e.g., Hormuz opening offer), probability triples. This is the binding constraint.
US already wants out. More pressure doesn't help much because the bottleneck is deal + Iran acceptance, not US willingness.
Escalation doesn't increase resolution вҖ” it changes the TYPE of resolution (forced vs negotiated). Impact on probability is indirect.

sensitivity.input: If Trump follows through on threat
sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution вҖ” it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.

leadingIndicators.signal: Steady at ~41/day. Rationing model holds. Coordinated barrage + IRGC defiance = institutional continuity proven.
$109.53 settled. Wall Street surged on hope. Markets vs reality mismatch. Binary: $85 or $130+ in <20 hrs.
10/day. Iran 10-pt demands Hormuz toll recognition = permanent change. Won't reopen for temp ceasefire.
Iran 10-pt = most detailed response ever. Islamabad Accord + 10-pt counteroffer = highest specificity. But MAXIMALIST gap.

ceasefireCalibration.source: Polymarket ceasefire-holds ~18% (down from 20%). Active blockade = maritime war. Trump 'deal' talk partially offsetting. Historical base rate ~50%. 7 days to expiry.

incidents.description_fa: Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ШҜШұ ШұЩҲШІ ШҜЩҲШ§ШІШҜЩҮЩ… Ш§ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘШӣ ШЁЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ЫІЫі Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ ШҙШҜЩҮ. ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ ШӘЩҲШіШ· Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁШіШӘЩҮ Щ…Ш§ЩҶШҜ (Ы° Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢШӣ ШЁШ§ШІШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜЪҜЫҢ ЩҶШ§ШҙЫҢ Ш§ШІ ШӘЫҢШұШ§ЩҶШҜШ§ШІЫҢ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҮ). ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШұЩҲЫҢШҜШ§ШҜ Ъ©ЫҢЩҶШӘЫҢЪ© Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜЫҢ ЪҜШІШ§ШұШҙ ЩҶШҙШҜ. ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘШ§ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮЫҢ ЩҶШҙЩҲШҜ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜ.

ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШөЩ„Шӯ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҮ ЫұЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… ШҙШҜ. ЩҲШ§ЫҢШі ЩҫЩҶШі ЩҲШ§ЩҶШі ЩҮЫҢШҰШӘ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ШұШ§ ШұЩҮШЁШұЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜ.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks reportedly delayed to Saturday Apr 12. Iran delegation composition unclear.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШёШ§ЩҮШұШ§ЩӢ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ ЫұЫІ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ Щ…ЩҲЪ©ЩҲЩ„ ШҙШҜ. ШӘШұЪ©ЫҢШЁ ЩҮЫҢШҰШӘ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШ§Щ…ШҙШ®Шө Ш§ШіШӘ.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks delayed from Friday to Saturday. Lebanon strikes escalated. Iran re-halted Hormuz opening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§ШІ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҲЪ©ЩҲЩ„ ШҙШҜ. ШӯЩ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШӘШҙШҜЫҢШҜ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШҙШ§ЫҢЫҢ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad talks began вҖ” 21-hour marathon. US delegation ~300 (Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) vs Iran ~70 (Ghalibaf, Araghchi). Largest diplomatic meeting of the war.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ШҙШұЩҲШ№ вҖ” Щ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘЩҶ ЫІЫұ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҮ. ЩҮЫҢШҰШӘ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ ~ЫіЫ°Ы° (ЩҲЩҶШіШҢ ЩҲЫҢШӘЪ©Ш§ЩҒШҢ Ъ©ЩҲШҙЩҶШұ) Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ~Ы·Ы° (ЩӮШ§Щ„ЫҢШЁШ§ЩҒШҢ Ш№ШұШ§ЩӮЪҶЫҢ).

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalism.' No new talks scheduled. Ceasefire expires Apr 21.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШҙЪ©ШіШӘ. Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШҜ ШӘШ№ЩҮШҜ ЩҮШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ. ЩҲЩҶШі: 'Ъ©Ш§ЩҒЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ.' ЩӮШ§Щ„ЫҢШЁШ§ЩҒ: 'Щ…Ш§Ъ©ШіЫҢЩ…Ш§Щ„ЫҢШіЩ… ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§.' Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ. ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TRUMP DECLARES NAVAL BLOCKADE. CENTCOM: all Iranian port traffic blocked starting Monday 10AM ET. No new peace talks scheduled. UK, France, Spain, Turkey refuse to join. China condemns. Diplomatic isolation deepening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮ ШҜШұЫҢШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ… Ъ©ШұШҜ. ШіЩҶШӘЪ©Ш§Щ…: ШЁЩҶШ§ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ. Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ. ШЁШұЫҢШӘШ§ЩҶЫҢШ§ШҢ ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶШіЩҮШҢ Ш§ШіЩҫШ§ЩҶЫҢШ§ШҢ ШӘШұЪ©ЫҢЩҮ ШұШҜ. ЪҶЫҢЩҶ Щ…ШӯЪ©ЩҲЩ….

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Pakistan offers 2nd Islamabad round; Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon ambassadors Tue
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҲШұ ШҜЩҲЩ… Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜШӣ ШұЩҲШЁЫҢЩҲ Щ…ЫҢШІШЁШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҒШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„-Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҮвҖҢШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: First potential Lebanon ceasefire track. Pakistan keeping channel open despite Islamabad collapse.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump 'close to over' (Fox Business) + Iran $270B reparations counter + business internet partial
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ В«ШЁШіЫҢШ§Шұ ЩҶШІШҜЫҢЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШ§ЩҶВ» + Ш¶ШҜЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ЫІЫ·Ы° Щ…ЫҢЩ„ЫҢШ§ШұШҜ ШҜЩ„Ш§Шұ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ + Ш§ЫҢЩҶШӘШұЩҶШӘ ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұЫҢ Ш¬ШІШҰЫҢ
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty are biggest gaps; nuclear 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze still unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Munir (Pakistan army chief) in Tehran with US proposal; Trump announces 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 5PM ET; AP: 'in principle' agreement to extend Iran ceasefire beyond Apr 21
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Щ…ЩҶЫҢШұ (ШұШҰЫҢШі Ш§ШұШӘШҙ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ) ШҜШұ ШӘЩҮШұШ§ЩҶ ШЁШ§ ЩҫЫҢШҙЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§Шӣ ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі ЫұЫ° ШұЩҲШІЩҮ Ш§ШіШұШ§ШҰЫҢЩ„-Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Ыө ШЁШ№ШҜШ§ШІШёЩҮШұШӣ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ В«ШҜШұ Ш§ШөЩҲЩ„В» ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ШўШӘШҙвҖҢШЁШі Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: 'In principle' extension not formally agreed (US official to CNBC). Nuclear gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze, ~440kg HEU stockpile. Hegseth 'restart combat' threat is paired stick. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran opens Hormuz as goodwill signal; CNN: Round 2 talks in Pakistan Monday (Apr 21) per Iranian sources; Trump 'pretty good news' signal
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШӯШіЩҶ ЩҶЫҢШӘ ШЁШ§ШІ Ъ©ШұШҜШӣ ШҜЩҲШұ ШҜЩҲЩ… Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ЩҫШ§Ъ©ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ (ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„) Ш·ШЁЩӮ Щ…ЩҶШ§ШЁШ№ Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶЫҢШӣ ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ: В«Ш§Ш®ШЁШ§Шұ ШЁШіЫҢШ§Шұ Ш®ЩҲШЁВ»
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: US blockade remains despite Hormuz 'open' signal вҖ” both sides signaling without coordination. Nuclear 5-yr vs 20-yr gap unchanged. Monday Round 2 unconfirmed by US side.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran re-closes Hormuz + fires on Indian ships; Round 2 talks still expected Islamabad Monday Apr 21 (Iranian sources only); Polymarket extension 74%; Iran studying fresh US proposals
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұЩ…ШІ ШұШ§ ШҜЩҲШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШЁШіШӘ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҮЩҶШҜЫҢ ШҙЩ„ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ШұШҜШӣ ШҜЩҲШұ ШҜЩҲЩ… Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ ЩҮЩҶЩҲШІ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶШӣ ЩҫЩ„ЫҢвҖҢЩ…Ш§ШұЪ©ШӘ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ Ы·ЫҙЩӘ
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Hormuz shots = Iran leveraging third-party (India) pressure on US blockade stance. Round 2 Monday = final window before Apr 21 expiry. US has NOT confirmed Monday talks. 3 days to ceasefire expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran parliament speaker Ghalibaf claims 'progress' in US-Iran talks; Trump threatens no extension without deal by Apr 21; Round 2 Islamabad talks expected Monday (expiry day); sticking points: nuclear enrichment, US blockade/Hormuz, war-damage compensation
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ШіШ®ЩҶЪҜЩҲЫҢ Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§ЫҢШұШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШ§Щ„ЫҢШЁШ§ЩҒ Ш§ШІ 'ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ' ШҜШұ Щ…Ш°Ш§Ъ©ШұШ§ШӘ ШЁШ§ ШўЩ…ШұЫҢЪ©Ш§ Ш®ШЁШұ ШҜШ§ШҜШӣ ШӘШұШ§Щ…Щҫ ШӘЩҮШҜЫҢШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜ Ш§ЪҜШұ ШӘШ§ ЫІЫұ ШўЩҲШұЫҢЩ„ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮЫҢ ЩҶШҙЩҲШҜ ШӘЩ…ШҜЫҢШҜ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜШӣ ШҜЩҲШұ ШҜЩҲЩ… Ш§ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…вҖҢШўШЁШ§ШҜ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҶШЁЩҮ (ШұЩҲШІ Ш§ЩҶЩӮШ¶Ш§) ЩҫЫҢШҙвҖҢШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҙЩҲШҜШӣ ЩҶЩӮШ§Ш· Ш§Ш®ШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ: ШәЩҶЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢШҢ Щ…ШӯШ§ШөШұЩҮШҢ ШәШұШ§Щ…ШӘ Ш¬ЩҶЪҜ
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Three unresolved sticking points: Iran nuclear enrichment rights, US naval blockade lift/Hormuz, war-damage compensation. Hormuz closure = Iran's peak leverage going into Monday talks. Deal or extension must happen Apr 21 = both sides' hard deadline.

ceasefireEconomicRecovery.note: D50-D51 HORMUZ CLOSED + SHOTS: Iran fired on Indian ships Apr 18 вҶ’ 0 vessels Apr 19 (shots-deterrence). Oil holding $97-98 on Hormuz closure. US blockade 23+ ships intercepted total. Ghalibaf 'progress' signal Apr 19 = positive but structural gaps remain. Internet business partial Day 6 ($1.8B+ cumulative). 2 days to Apr 21 expiry.

branchExtend.detail: Most likely if framework but no final agreement. Pakistan mediates.

branchDeal.detail: Mine clearance, insurance normalization, escorts resume.

branchCollapse.detail: Immediate return to pre-ceasefire dynamics. Worse вҖ” broken trust amplifies.
Worse than before вҖ” broken ceasefire = higher risk premium.

branchStalled.detail: Talks stall, Hormuz slow, both sides posturing.
Tension builds. Markets re-price war risk.
